summary: This is a very brief link post where Joel Spolsky points readers to his longer article 'How to Ship Anything,' which describes how Fog Creek Software optimized their physical order shipping process, reducing the labor time from 3 minutes to 35 seconds per order. The post serves as a teaser for the full article about operational efficiency in a software company's fulfillment process.
key_points: Fog Creek dramatically reduced order shipping labor from 3 minutes to 35 seconds per order
Even software companies need to optimize physical logistics and operational processes
Process optimization can yield order-of-magnitude improvements in efficiency
money_quotes: We cut the amount of labor it takes to ship orders from 3 minutes to 35 seconds.
key_insight: Dramatic efficiency gains are possible in mundane operational processes like order fulfillment through systematic optimization.
